_comment: Canonical schema for the audit trail JSON written by mysterycall_clean_phase1(). All fields listed under 'required' must be present in every audit file. Fields under 'volatile' are present but excluded from snapshot comparisons because they change between runs. Field names here are the actual JSON keys, not the idealized names from early docs.

required.schema_version: string — semantic version (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH) of the audit JSON schema; bump MINOR on new required fields, MAJOR on breaking renames
required.cohort_hash: string — SHA-256 hex digest of the input phase1_data object; same input always produces the same hash, enabling cache invalidation and drift detection
required.artifact_id: string — SHA-256 hex digest of the stable (non-volatile) audit payload; content-addressable output identity; same run always produces the same artifact_id; enables lineage chain immutability and cache corruption detection
required.input_rows: integer — number of rows in the input data frame
required.input_cols: integer — number of columns in the input data frame
required.input_colnames: array of strings — column names of the input data frame
required.output_rows: integer — number of rows in the output data frame
required.output_cols: integer — number of columns in the output data frame (>= input_cols due to processing_flag_* additions)
required.empty_names_count: integer — rows where names column was NA or whitespace-only
required.no_last_name_count: integer — rows where last name could not be extracted
required.rows_duplicated: boolean — TRUE if duplicate_rows argument was TRUE
required.original_npi_preserved: boolean — TRUE if input contained an npi column
required.quality_metrics: object — completeness and flag summary metrics

volatile.parameters: object containing output_directory path — excluded from snapshots

conditional.generated_ids_count: integer — present only when NPI column exists and rows lacked an NPI
conditional.input_npi_count: integer — present only when NPI column exists
conditional.rows_after_duplication: integer — present only when duplicate_rows = TRUE
conditional.parent_cohort_hash: string — SHA-256 hex digest of the upstream cohort that produced the input; present only when the caller supplied a valid parent_cohort_hash argument; NULL otherwise; enables DAG lineage tracing across pipeline steps

migration_policy._comment: Rules governing when schema_version must be bumped. Follow semantic versioning: MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH. Downstream tooling that reads audit JSON must pin to a MAJOR version.
PATCH: Fix a documentation string or _comment in this file
Add a new volatile field (does not affect snapshot comparisons)
Add a new conditional field that is absent by default
MINOR: Add a new required field with a non-breaking default (e.g. NULL or empty string)
Add a new conditional field that may become required in a future MAJOR release
Expand the set of values accepted by an existing field
MAJOR: Change the type of an existing field (e.g. integer → string)
Change a conditional field to required without a compatible default
Change the hash algorithm used for cohort_hash

history.change: Initial versioned schema with required, volatile, and conditional sections
Added schema_version and cohort_hash as required fields (MINOR: both have safe defaults for callers reading older artifacts)
Added artifact_id as required field: SHA-256 of stable audit payload; enables content-addressable provenance and lineage chain immutability (MINOR: additive)
